caption: A man with a shaved head and a beard is recorded in a studio setting with dark, vertically ribbed acoustic foam walls. He wears a white t-shirt and black over-ear headphones. A professional condenser microphone is positioned on a boom arm in front of him; the arm features the text "Rode PSA1+". He is speaking into the microphone, and his facial expressions and mouth movements shift slightly as he talks. His right arm, which is partially visible, is covered in tattoos. Across the sequence, the man remains in a stationary position, and the camera angle and lighting stay consistent. The only movement is the slight shifting of his gaze and the motion of his lips as he articulates words.
